_comment: EDIT THIS FILE to update the founder's name, story, values, and image. Replace the image src with the actual photo file path under /public/media/founder/.
name: Rameshwari Kalyankar
title: Founder, Orchid Unisex Salon & Spa
tagline: "Wellness is not a luxury — it is a necessity for every body that works hard, hurts, and strives to be its best."
story: Rameshwari Kalyankar founded Orchid from a simple conviction: Kolhapur deserved a genuine wellness destination. She saw the gap — athletes needing recovery, seniors seeking relief, travellers exhausted after long journeys, professionals battling daily stress — and built Orchid to serve all of them, with warm herbal oil rituals, therapeutic massages, and premium salon care under one roof.

With deep community roots and an innate gift for human connection, she personally handpicked every therapist and set the standards of care that define Orchid today. The result is a space where healing, recovery, and beauty come together — trusted, expert, and genuinely warm every single visit.

values.title: Healing at Heart
values.description: Every treatment is designed with your body's recovery and long-term wellbeing as the priority.

values.title: Built for All Bodies
values.description: Athletes, seniors, travellers, gym-goers — Orchid serves every person at every stage of their wellness journey.

values.title: Community Trust
values.description: Built on real relationships — our reputation comes from clients who leave feeling measurably better, every visit.

certifications: Certified Spa, Massage & Salon Team under her supervision

image.alt: Rameshwari Kalyankar, Founder of Orchid Unisex Salon & Spa
image._note: To replace: copy your photo to /public/media/founder/founder.png (or .jpg) and update the src above.
